description: Revamp TarotGameScreen.kt UI to match the web frontend style - add background image, golden/mystical yellow theme, card-back images using Coil, floating animations, hover/click sounds, and enhanced oracle reading styling. DO NOT change any ViewModel calls or game logic.
steps: Step 1: Read the current TarotGameScreen.kt to confirm existing ViewModel calls.

Step 2: Revamp TarotGameScreen.kt UI: (a) Add GameBackground with URL 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/images/asset/games/background/tarot-background.jpg'. (b) Make Scaffold/TopAppBar transparent. (c) Change accent color to TarotYellow (#ffde59) for titles/highlights, keep MysticGold for borders/buttons. (d) In CARD_SELECTION phase: replace the emoji-based card placeholders with AsyncImage showing the card-back image 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/images/asset/tarot/closed-card.png'. When selected, add a purple glow border (drop-shadow effect via border+elevation). (e) In ORACLE phase: show the revealed card images if card.image is available (from TarotCardDetail.image field) using AsyncImage. (f) Style the AI reading section (READING phase) with a mystic border (golden, rounded), semi-transparent background, and the text in warm cream color (#fffde7). (g) Add floating animation to phase titles (animateFloatAsState infinite). (h) Add SoundManager: BGM 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/sound/bgm/bgm-tarot.mp3' on entry, click sound 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/sound/sfx/click2.wav' when tapping cards or buttons. (i) In the element selection area, style elements with the web's .element-selection look - horizontal row of clickable text items with glow when selected.
Step 3: Ensure ALL ViewModel interactions remain unchanged: viewModel.startRitual(), viewModel.pickCards(name, energy, cards), viewModel.getReading().
Step 4: Verify card selection logic still works (selectedCardIds set operations, 3-card limit, TarotCardSelection construction).
acceptance_criteria: TarotGameScreen.kt displays background image from remote URL
Card backs show the closed-card.png image via AsyncImage
Golden/yellow theme (#ffde59) used for titles and highlights
Revealed cards in ORACLE/READING phase show card images if available
BGM plays on entry, click sounds on card/button taps
AI reading section has mystic styling with golden border
All ViewModel function calls remain identical
Card selection logic (3-card max, selectedCardIds) unchanged
verification: Read TarotGameScreen.kt and verify ViewModel calls unchanged
Verify AsyncImage used for card-back and revealed card images
Verify SoundManager usage for BGM and click sounds
Verify GameBackground usage with correct URL
